creator: skuti@skuti.is
text:
gstreamer-plugins depends on port devel/orc

in the updates port tree orc has bean updated from 0.4.0 to 0.4.9

gstreamer-plugins/Makefile still depends on orc-0.4.0

Fix: 

fix dependence on orc in the file gstreamer-plugins/Makefile
How-To-Repeat: update port tree and install gstreamer-plugins
